The value of design condenser pressure to be measured at 300 mm above the top row of condenser tubes shall be guaranteed under VWO condition, 3% make-up, design CW inlet temperature and CW flow. The condenser vacuum shall be measured with a vacuum grid utilising ASME basket tips. ii) The condenser hotwell shall be size d for three (3) minute storage capacity (between normal and low-low level) of total design flow with the turbine operating at VWO condition, 3% make-up, design condenser pressure. The low- low level of hotwell shall be at least 200 mm above the bottom of hotwell. 3.9.2.2 Design parameters for condenser and associated systems i) Condenser design parameters: a) Number of passes : Single pass/ double pass b) Design cold water temp. : 330C7 c) Min. size (OD) of the tube : 22.225mm d) Minimum thickness of the tube : 22 BWG e) Tube velocity : 1.6 to 2.2 m/sec f) Design condenser pressure : 77 mm Hg (abs)8 g) Max. tube length between tube plates : 15 meters h) Temperature rise of circulating water : 8 to 10 deg C 9 across the condenser 7 280C for sea water based once- through type CW system. 8 60mm Hg (abs) for sea water based once- through type CW system. 9 Not to exceed 70C for sea water based once- through type CW system Standard Technical Specification for Sub- critical Thermal Power Project - 2x(500MW or above) Main Plant Package Section- 3 (Steam Turbine and Auxiliaries) 3 - 33 i) Tube material : Stainless steel ASTM A249 TP304 10 j) Cleanliness factor : 0.9 k) Fouling factors : As per HEI l) Tube plug margin : 5% under design condenser condition m) Max. CW side pressure drop across : 6 mwc bidder’s terminal points with tube cleaning system in operation n) Maximum temperature of circulating : 36 deg C 11 water o) Condenser arrangement : Perpendicular to T G a x i s ii) Water box design pressure : 5.0 kg/cm 2 (g) iii) Water box test pressure : 1.3 times the design pressure iv) Water box design temperature : 600C v) Shell side design pressure : Full vacuum and 1.08 kg/cm 2 (g) vi) Shell side design temperature : 1200C vii) Design parameters for expansion joints a) Design pressure :
